name: Whole Wheat Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the whole wheat flour, brown sugar, salt, and baking powder.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, and safflower oil (or melted butter/margarine).
3. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients, stirring until just combined.
4. Heat a griddle or non-stick skillet over medium heat. Grease lightly with oil if needed.
5. Pour about 1/4 cup of batter per pancake onto the hot griddle.
6. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges are dry (about 2-3 minutes).
7. Flip the pancakes carefully and cook for another 2-3 minutes on the other side, until golden brown.
8. Serve immediately with maple syrup.
